question_text: Let 𝑋ଵ, 𝑋ଶ, … , 𝑋ଵ଼ be a random sample from the distribution 𝑓(𝑥; 𝜃) = ቐ 𝜃𝑒ି௫మ/ఏ, 𝑥> 0, 0, 𝑥≤0. Let 𝜒ఈ,௡

options.D: enote the value of a Chi-square random variable 𝑌 with 𝑛 degrees of freedom such that 𝑃൫𝑌> 𝜒ఈ,௡ ൯= 𝛼. If 𝑥ଵ, 𝑥ଶ, … , 𝑥ଵ଼ is a realization of this random sample, then, based on the sufficient statistic ∑ ௜ୀଵ , which one of the following is a 98% confidence interval for 𝜃?
